overview: NuclearEdu is a comprehensive interactive educational platform for nuclear science with 3D visualizations, simulations, and deep technical content for all learning levels.
features: Interactive 3D reactor visualizations with cinematic effects
Chart of Nuclides heatmap with 3000+ isotopes
Decay Chain Explorer with gamma spectroscopy and secular equilibrium
Nucleus Visualizer with shell model and decay animations
Full interactive periodic table with 12+ heatmap overlays
Nuclear Power Plant World Map with 440+ reactors
Learning Lab with quizzes, badges, and progress tracking
Expert mode toggle for students and researchers
Internet Identity login and PWA offline support
